action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 28 eval returned AUC=0.7658, our best score. Only ~34 seconds and 2 iterations remain. Analysis: There is no time to train new models or run optimization. Re-submitting the proven ensemble_15 artifact is the safest way to ensure the best score is locked in before the budget expires. Decision: Submit eval on ensemble_15 immediately.
